% Per cell: |S-floor| of baseline alone, |S-floor| after TanGCE, mean improvement (pp; bold if > 0.05pp), wins/reach.
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{\textbf{TanGCE complements every baseline.} Mean $|S-S_{\text{floor}}|$ in pp before (B alone) and after stacking the canonical TanGCE recipe ($\varepsilon{=}0.1$, $h{=}512$, scorer warm-start, $\le 60$ iter steps) on top of each baseline B's natively-converged reps. ``Improvement'' is mean $\big(|S{-}S_{\text{fl.}}|_{\text{B}} - |S{-}S_{\text{fl.}}|_{\text{B$+$T}}\big)$ in pp at the indicated $\Delta Y$ budget (positive = TanGCE moved closer to chance). Wins/reach: panels where TanGCE gained $>0.05$pp / panels with at least one in-budget TanGCE step. 39 NLP panels (13 model families $\times$ 3 concepts) at 50\%-depth, fresh nonlinear probe ($h{=}128$). $\Delta Y$ measured against the {\itshape baseline}'s endpoint, not the original clean reps, to isolate TanGCE's marginal contribution. The LEACE$+$CovMatch $K{=}2$ row is excluded — that {\itshape is} the SOTA pipeline of the main table.}
\label{tab:tangce_on_baseline}
